name: hello-world
description: A friendly greeting plugin for Kimi Code — great starting point for learning plugin development
author: Kimi Plugin Community

interface.shortDescription: A friendly greeting plugin — great starting point for learning plugin development
interface.longDescription:
Hello World is a simple demo plugin that introduces the basic structure of a Kimi Code plugin.

It includes a greeting skill that demonstrates:
- Plugin manifest structure (kimi.plugin.json)
- Skill format with YAML frontmatter
- How skills are loaded and invoked

Use this as a reference when building your own plugins.
